codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds hover states to the age filter ToggleGroupItem component. The change is minimal (1 line modified), uses consistent Tailwind CSS patterns with CSS custom properties (--accent, --foreground), and adds a duration-150 transition for smooth visual feedback. The worker correctly identified that other assertions (VAL-MICRO-002, 003, 007, 008, 009) were already satisfied by existing code.

summary: PASS. The implementation correctly addresses VAL-MICRO-004 by adding hover:bg-[hsl(var(--accent))] and hover:text-[hsl(var(--foreground))] with duration-150 transition to ToggleGroupItem. Code inspection confirms all other assertions (VAL-MICRO-002, 003, 007, 008, 009) were already satisfied: Reroll button default variant has hover:brightness-105; age filter indicator has transition-transform duration-200 ease-out; Apple Music and Reroll buttons have disabled:opacity-60 with disabled={!album} and disabled={controlsDisabled}; buttons have focus-visible:ring-2 for keyboard navigation. Lint and build pass, and the change follows existing component patterns from shadcn/ui.
